name: job-compliance-agent
description: Monorepo for the job compliance audit agent.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @job-compliance/api && npm run build --workspace @job-compliance/web
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @job-compliance/shared && npm run build --workspace @job-compliance/core && npm run build --workspace @job-compliance/database
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @job-compliance/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @job-compliance/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspace @job-compliance/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @job-compliance/web
